6// @name AdGuard Extra

18// @name:fr AdGuard Extra
19// @name:he AdGuard Extra
20// @name:hr AdGuard Extra
21// @name:hu AdGuard Extra
22// @name:hy AdGuard Extra
23// @name:id AdGuard Extra
24// @name:it AdGuard Extra
25// @name:ja AdGuard Extra
26// @name:ko AdGuard Extra
27// @name:lt AdGuard Extra
28// @name:lv AdGuard Extra
29// @name:ms Adguard Tambahan
30// @name:nl AdGuard Extra
31// @name:no AdGuard Extra
32// @name:pl AdGuard Extra
33// @name:pt-PT AdGuard Extra
34// @name:pt AdGuard Extra
35// @name:ro AdGuard Extra
36// @name:ru AdGuard Extra
37// @name:sk AdGuard Extra
38// @name:sl Uporabi AdGuard Extra

44// @name:vi AdGuard Extra
45// @name:zh-HK AdGuard Extra
46// @name:zh-TW AdGuard Extra
47// @name:zh AdGuard Extra
48// @namespace adguard
49// @version 1.1.19
50// @description AdGuard Extra is designed to solve complicated cases when regular ad blocking rules aren't enough.
51// @description:ar AdGuard Extra مصمم من أجل أن يحل الحالات المعقدة التي لا تتمكن قواعد حظر الإعلانات العادية من حظرها.
52// @description:be AdGuard Extra прызначаны для вырашэння складаных выпадкаў, калі звычайных правілаў блакавання рэкламы недастаткова.
53// @description:bg AdGuard Extra е създаден да решава сложни случаи, когато обикновените правила за блокиране на реклами не са достатъчни.
54// @description:cs AdGuard Extra má za úkol řešit složité případy, když běžná pravidla pro blokování reklam nestačí.
55// @description:da AdGuard Extra er designet til at løse komplicerede tilfælde, hvor alm. adblockingregler ikke er nok.
56// @description:de AdGuard Extra wurde für komplizierte Fälle entwickelt, in denen reguläre Werbeblockerregeln nicht ausreichen.
57// @description:el Το AdGuard Extra είναι σχεδιασμένο να επιλύει περίπλοκες καταστάσεις όπου οι κοινοί κανόνες αποκλεισμού διαφημίσεων δεν αρκούν.
58// @description:es AdGuard Extra está diseñado para resolver casos complicados cuando las reglas regulares para bloqueo de anuncios no son suficientes.
59// @description:et AdGuard Extra on mõeldud keeruliste juhtumite lahendamiseks, kui tavalistest reklaamide blokeerimise reeglitest ei piisa.
60// @description:fi AdGuard Extra on suunniteltu ratkaisemaan monimutkaisia tapauksia silloin kun tavalliset mainosestosäännöt eivät riitä.
61// @description:fr AdGuard Extra est conçu pour résoudre les cas complexes lorsque les règles de blocage des publicités ne suffisent pas.
62// @description:he AdGuard Extra מתוכנן לפתור מקרים מורכבים בהם כללים רגילים של חסימת פרסומות אינם מספיקים.
63// @description:hr AdGuard Extra je dizajniran za rješavanje kompleksnih slučajeva kada opća pravila blokade oglasa nisu dovoljna.
64// @description:hu Az AdGuard Extra olyan bonyolultabb esetek megoldására szolgál, amikor a hagyományos hirdetésblokkolási szabályok nem elegendőek.
65// @description:hy AdGuard Extra նախատեսում է լուծել ավելի բարդ խնդիրներ, երբ սովորական մարքեթինգի հայտարարությունների արգելափակման կանոնները բավական չեն:
66// @description:id AdGuard Extra dirancang untuk menyelesaikan kasus rumit saat aturan pemblokiran iklan biasa tidak cukup.
67// @description:it AdGuard Extra è progettato per risolvere casi complicati in cui le normali regole di blocca-annunci non sono sufficienti.
68// @description:ja AdGuard Extraは、通常の広告ブロックルールが十分ではない複雑なケースを解決するために設計されています。
69// @description:ko AdGuard Extra는 일반적인 광고 차단 규칙이 충분하지 않은 복잡한 문제를 해결하도록 설계되었습니다.
70// @description:lt AdGuard Extra yra skirtas išspręsti sudėtingesnius atvejus, kai nepakanka įprastų skelbimų blokavimo taisyklių.
71// @description:lv AdGuard Extra ir paredzēts sarežģītu gadījumu risināšanai, kad nepietiek ar parastajiem reklāmu bloķēšanas noteikumiem.
72// @description:ms AdGuard Tambahan direka untuk menyelesaikan kes rumit apabila peraturan sekatan iklan biasa tidak mencukupi.
73// @description:nl AdGuard Extra is bedoeld om ingewikkelde gevallen op te lossen wanneer de standaard advertentie blokkeringsregels niet voldoende blijken.
74// @description:no AdGuard Extra er utformet for å løse kompliserte saker der vanlige blokkeringsoppføringer ikke strekker til.
75// @description:pl AdGuard Extra jest przeznaczony do rozwiązywania skomplikowanych przypadków, gdy zwykłe reguły blokowania reklam nie wystarczą.
76// @description:pt-PT O AdGuard Extra é indicado para resolver casos complicados onde as regras regulares de bloqueio de anúncios não são suficientes.
77// @description:pt O AdGuard Extra é indicado para resolver casos complicados onde as regras regulares de bloqueio de anúncios não são suficientes.
78// @description:ro AdGuard Extra este creeat să rezolve cazuri complexe când regulile uzuale de blocat reclame sunt insuficiente.
79// @description:ru AdGuard Extra предназначен для решения более сложных задач, когда обычных правил блокировки рекламы недостаточно.
80// @description:sk AdGuard Extra má za úlohu riešiť zložité prípady, keď bežné pravidlá blokovania reklám nestačia.
81// @description:sl AdGuard Extra naj bi rešil zapletene primere, ko običajna pravila za zaviranje oglasov niso dovolj.
82// @description:sr AdGuard Extra bi trebalo da reši komplikovane slučajeve u kojima standardna pravila blokiranja reklama nisu dovoljna.
83// @description:th AdGuard Extra ถูกออกแบบมาเพื่อแก้ไขกรณีที่ซับซ้อนเมื่อกฎการปิดกั้นโฆษณาปกติไม่เพียงพอ
84// @description:tr AdGuard Extra, normal reklam engelleme kurallarının yeterli olmadığı karmaşık durumları çözmek için tasarlanmıştır.
85// @description:uk AdGuard Extra призначений для вирішення складних завдань, коли звичайних правил для блокування реклами недостатньо.
86// @description:vi AdGuard Extra được thiết kế để giải quyết các vấn đề khi mà các quy tắc chặn quảng cáo thông thường chưa đủ.
87// @description:zh-HK AdGuard Extra 可以解決一般封鎖規則不足以處理廣告的問題。
88// @description:zh-TW 當常規的廣告封鎖規則不夠時，AdGuard Extra 旨在解決複雜的情況。
89// @description:zh AdGuard Extra 旨在解决常规的广告拦截规则无能为力的复杂情况。
90// @downloadURL https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js
91// @updateURL https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js
92// @homepageURL https://adguard.com/
93// @supportURL https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra/issues/
94// @author AdGuard
95// @match *://*/*
96// @grant unsafeWindow

135 function gqlRequest(body) {
136 if (!GQLDeviceID) {
137 const chars = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
138 for (let i = 0; i < 32; i += 1) {
139 GQLDeviceID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
140 }
141 }
142 const headers = {
143 'Client-ID': ClientID,
144 'Client-Integrity': ClientIntegrityHeader,
145 'Device-ID': GQLDeviceID,
146 'X-Device-Id': GQLDeviceID,
147 'Client-Version': ClientVersion,
148 'Client-Session-Id': ClientSession,
149 Authorization: AuthorizationHeader
150 };
151 return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
152 const requestId = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15);
153 const fetchRequest = {
154 id: requestId,
155 url: 'https://gql.twitch.tv/gql',
156 options: {
157 method: 'POST',
158 body: JSON.stringify(body),

160 }
161 };

164 reject

172 function parseAttributes(str) {
173 return Object.fromEntries(str.split(/(?:^|,)((?:[^=]*)=(?:"[^"]*"|[^,]*))/).filter(x => !!x).map(x => {
174 const idx = x.indexOf('=');
175 const key = x.substring(0, idx);
176 const value = x.substring(idx + 1);
177 if (value.startsWith('"')) {
178 return [key, JSON.parse(value)];
179 }
180 const num = parseInt(value, 10);
181 if (!Number.isNaN(num)) {
182 return [key, num];
183 }
184 return [key, value];
185 }));
186 }
187 function getAccessToken(channelName, playerType) {
188 const query = 'query PlaybackAccessToken_Template($login: String!, $isLive: Boolean!, $vodID: ID!, $isVod: Boolean!, $playerType: String!) { streamPlaybackAccessToken(channelName: $login, params: {platform: "ios", playerBackend: "mediaplayer", playerType: $playerType}) @include(if: $isLive) { value signature __typename } videoPlaybackAccessToken(id: $vodID, params: {platform: "ios", playerBackend: "mediaplayer", playerType: $playerType}) @include(if: $isVod) { value signature __typename }}';
189 const body = {
190 operationName: 'PlaybackAccessToken_Template',
191 query,
192 variables: {
193 isLive: true,
194 login: channelName,
195 isVod: false,
196 vodID: '',
197 playerType
198 }
199 };
200 return gqlRequest(body);
201 }
202 function getStreamUrlForResolution(encodingsM3u8, resolutionInfo, qualityOverrideStr) {
203 let qualityOverride = 0;
204 if (qualityOverrideStr && qualityOverrideStr.endsWith('p')) {
205 const numericPart = qualityOverrideStr.slice(0, -1);
206 const numericValue = parseInt(numericPart, 10);
207 if (!Number.isNaN(numericValue)) {
208 qualityOverride = numericValue;
209 }
210 }
211 const encodingsLines = encodingsM3u8.replace('\r', '').split('\n');
212 let firstUrl = null;
213 let lastUrl = null;
214 let matchedResolutionUrl = null;
215 let matchedFrameRate = false;
216 for (let i = 0; i < encodingsLines.length; i += 1) {
217 const line = encodingsLines[i];
218 const previousLine = encodingsLines[i - 1];
219 if (line.startsWith('#') || !line.includes('.m3u8')) {
220 continue;
221 }
222 if (i === 0 || !previousLine.startsWith('#EXT-X-STREAM-INF')) {
223 continue;
224 }
225 const attributes = parseAttributes(previousLine);
226 const resolution = attributes.RESOLUTION;
227 if (!resolution) {
228 continue;
229 }
230 const frameRate = attributes['FRAME-RATE'];
231 if (qualityOverride) {
232 const quality = resolution.toLowerCase().split('x')[1];
233 if (parseInt(quality, 10) === qualityOverride) {
234 qualityOverrideFoundQuality = quality;
235 qualityOverrideFoundFrameRate = frameRate;
236 matchedResolutionUrl = line;
237 if (frameRate < 40) {
238 return matchedResolutionUrl;
239 }
240 } else if (quality < qualityOverride) {
241 return matchedResolutionUrl || line;
242 }
243 } else if ((!resolutionInfo || resolution === resolutionInfo.Resolution) && (!matchedResolutionUrl || !matchedFrameRate && frameRate === resolutionInfo.FrameRate)) {
244 matchedResolutionUrl = line;
245 matchedFrameRate = frameRate === resolutionInfo.FrameRate;
246 if (matchedFrameRate) {
247 return matchedResolutionUrl;
248 }
249 }
250 if (!firstUrl) {
251 firstUrl = line;
252 }
253 lastUrl = line;
254 }
255 if (qualityOverride) {
256 return lastUrl;
257 }
258 return matchedResolutionUrl || firstUrl;
259 }
260 async function getStreamForResolution(streamInfo, resolutionInfo, encodingsM3u8, fallbackStreamStr, playerType, realFetch) {
261 const qualityOverride = null;
262 if (streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].Resolution !== resolutionInfo.Resolution || streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].RequestTime < Date.now() - EncodingCacheTimeout) {
263 console.log(`Blocking ads (
264 type:${playerType},
265 resolution:${resolutionInfo.Resolution},
266 frameRate:${resolutionInfo.FrameRate},
267 qualityOverride:${qualityOverride}
268)`);
269 }
270 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].RequestTime = Date.now();
271 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].Value = encodingsM3u8;
272 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].Resolution = resolutionInfo.Resolution;
273 const streamM3u8Url = getStreamUrlForResolution(encodingsM3u8, resolutionInfo, qualityOverride);
274 const streamM3u8Response = await realFetch(streamM3u8Url);
275 if (streamM3u8Response.status === 200) {
276 const m3u8Text = await streamM3u8Response.text();
277 WasShowingAd = true;
278 postMessage({
279 key: 'ShowAdBlockBanner'
280 });
281 postMessage({
282 key: 'ForceChangeQuality'
283 });
284 if (!m3u8Text || m3u8Text.includes(AdSignifier)) {
285 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].Value = null;
286 }
287 return m3u8Text;
288 }
289 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType].Value = null;
290 return fallbackStreamStr;
291 }

299 if (WasShowingAd) {
300 console.log('Finished blocking ads');
301 WasShowingAd = false;
302 postMessage({
303 key: 'ForceChangeQuality',
304 value: 'original'
305 });
306 postMessage({
307 key: 'PauseResumePlayer'
308 });
309 postMessage({
310 key: 'HideAdBlockBanner'
311 });
312 }
313 return textStr;
314 }

318 if (resUrl === url) {

321 }
322 }

325 if (encodingsM3U8Cache) {
326 const {
327 Value,
328 RequestTime
329 } = encodingsM3U8Cache;
330 if (Value && RequestTime >= Date.now() - EncodingCacheTimeout) {
331 try {
332 const result = getStreamForResolution(streamInfo, currentResolution, Value, null, playerType, realFetch);
333 if (result) {
334 return result;
335 }
336 } catch (err) {
337 encodingsM3U8Cache.Value = null;
338 }
339 }
340 } else {
341 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache[playerType] = {
342 RequestTime: Date.now(),
343 Value: null,
344 Resolution: null
345 };
346 }

367 return encodingsM3u8Response && encodingsM3u8Response.status === 200 ? getStreamForResolution(streamInfo, currentResolution, await encodingsM3u8Response.text(), textStr, playerType, realFetch) : textStr;
368 }

373 return req.responseText.split("'")[1];

375 function hookWorkerFetch() {
376 console.log('Twitch Worker has been hooked');
377 const realFetch = fetch;
378 fetch = async function fetch(url, options) {
379 if (typeof url !== 'string') {

383 return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
384 async function processAfter(response) {
385 if (response.status === 200) {
386 const responseText = await response.text();
387 let weaverText = null;
388 weaverText = await processM3U8(url, responseText, realFetch, PlayerType2);
389 if (weaverText.includes(AdSignifier)) {
390 weaverText = await processM3U8(url, responseText, realFetch, PlayerType3);
391 }
392 if (weaverText.includes(AdSignifier)) {
393 weaverText = await processM3U8(url, responseText, realFetch, PlayerType4);
394 }
395 if (weaverText.includes(AdSignifier)) {
396 weaverText = await processM3U8(url, responseText, realFetch, PlayerType5);
397 }

399 } else {
400 resolve(response);
401 }
402 }
403 realFetch(url, options).then(processAfter).catch(reject);
404 });
405 }
406 if (url.includes('/api/channel/hls/') || url.includes('/api/v2/channel/hls/')) {
407 const channelName = new URL(url).pathname.match(/([^\/]+)(?=\.\w+$)/)[0];
408 UsherParams = new URL(url).search;
409 CurrentChannelName = channelName;
410 const isPBYPRequest = url.includes('picture-by-picture');
411 if (isPBYPRequest) {
412 url = '';
413 }
414 return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
415 async function processAfter(response) {
416 if (response.status !== 200) {
417 resolve(response);
418 }
419 encodingsM3u8 = await response.text();
420 let streamInfo = StreamInfos[channelName];
421 if (streamInfo == null) {
422 StreamInfos[channelName] = {};
423 streamInfo = {};
424 }
425 streamInfo.ChannelName = channelName;
426 streamInfo.Urls = [];
427 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8Cache = [];
428 streamInfo.EncodingsM3U8 = encodingsM3u8;
429 const lines = encodingsM3u8.replace('\r', '').split('\n');
430 for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i += 1) {
431 const line = lines[i];
432 const previousLine = lines[i - 1];
433 if (!line.startsWith('#') && line.includes('.m3u8')) {
434 streamInfo.Urls[line] = -1;
435 StreamInfosByUrl[line] = streamInfo;
436 MainUrlByUrl[line] = url;
437 if (i === 0 || !previousLine.startsWith('#EXT-X-STREAM-INF')) {
438 continue;
439 }
440 const attributes = parseAttributes(previousLine);
441 const resolution = attributes.RESOLUTION;
442 const frameRate = attributes['FRAME-RATE'];
443 if (resolution) {
444 streamInfo.Urls[line] = {
445 Resolution: resolution,
446 FrameRate: frameRate
447 };
448 }
449 }
450 }
451 resolve(new Response(encodingsM3u8));
452 }
453 realFetch(url, options).then(processAfter).catch(reject);
454 });
455 }
456 return realFetch.apply(this, arguments);
457 };
458 }
459 function stripUnusedParams(str) {
460 let params = arguments.length > 1 && arguments[1] !== undefined ? arguments[1] : ['token', 'sig'];
461 const tempUrl = new URL(`https://localhost/${str}`);
462 for (let i = 0; i < params.length; i += 1) {
463 tempUrl.searchParams.delete(params[i]);
464 }
465 return tempUrl.pathname.substring(1) + tempUrl.search;
466 }
467 function adRecordgqlPacket(event, radToken, payload) {
468 const gqlRequestBody = {
469 operationName: 'ClientSideAdEventHandling_RecordAdEvent',
470 variables: {
471 input: {
472 eventName: event,
473 eventPayload: JSON.stringify(payload),
474 radToken
475 }
476 },
477 extensions: {
478 persistedQuery: {
479 version: 1,
480 sha256Hash: '7e6c69e6eb59f8ccb97ab73686f3d8b7d85a72a0298745ccd8bfc68e4054ca5b'
481 }
482 }
483 };
484 return [gqlRequestBody];
485 }
486 async function tryNotifyTwitch(streamM3u8) {
487 const matches = streamM3u8.match(/#EXT-X-DATERANGE:(ID="stitched-ad-[^\n]+)\n/);
488 if (!matches || matches.length <= 1) {
489 return;
490 }
491 const attrString = matches[1];
492 const attr = parseAttributes(attrString);
493 const adId = attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-ADVERTISER-ID'];
494 const rollType = attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-ROLL-TYPE'].toLowerCase();
495 const creativeId = attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-CREATIVE-ID'];
496 const orderId = attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-ORDER-ID'];
497 const lineItemId = attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-LINE-ITEM-ID'];
498 const baseData = {
499 stitched: true,
500 ad_id: adId,
501 roll_type: rollType,
502 creative_id: creativeId,
503 order_id: orderId,
504 line_item_id: lineItemId,
505 player_mute: true,
506 player_volume: 0.0,
507 visible: false,
508 duration: 0
509 };
510 const podLength = parseInt(attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-POD-LENGTH'] || '1', 10);
511 const radToken = attr['X-TV-TWITCH-AD-RADS-TOKEN'];
512 for (let podPosition = 0; podPosition < podLength; podPosition += 1) {
513 const extendedData = _objectSpread$1(_objectSpread$1({}, baseData), {}, {
514 ad_position: podPosition,
515 total_ads: podLength
516 });
517 const adRecord = adRecordgqlPacket('video_ad_impression', radToken, extendedData);
518 await gqlRequest(adRecord);
519 for (let quartile = 0; quartile < 4; quartile += 1) {

Windows"},"grants":["GM_getValue","GM_setValue","GM_deleteValue","GM_listValues","GM_getResourceURL","unsafeWindow"],"feedbackUrl":"http://api.adguard.org","locale":"ja","appVersion":"7.22.5267.0","nonce":"3a2ac4f7a0fd45e3a4497ed2f52"},"data":{"allowed":"[LString;claude.ai","ver":"[LString;3","silenced":"[LString;","#id":"[LString;PTYk1U/8QphhVFnkJjJD3NGj7iAtsUnQ"},"content":(function anonymous(gmApi){
960/* userscript-transformer - v2.2.0 - 10/15/2025 */
961with(gmApi.sandbox){(function(userscript){"use strict";userscript.call(gmApi.sandbox,gmApi.getStaticVars(),gmApi.getDynamicVars(),undefined)})((function(a,b,gmApi){var GM=a.GM;var GM_info=a.GM_info;var createObjectIn=a.createObjectIn;var exportFunction=a.exportFunction;var cloneInto=a.cloneInto;var adguardSettings=a.settings;var AdguardSettings=a.settings;var ADG_addRule=a.ADG_addRule;var ADG_removeRule=a.ADG_removeRule;var ADG_isFiltered=a.ADG_isFiltered;var ADG_changeFilteringState=a.ADG_changeFilteringState;var ADG_temporaryDontBlock=a.ADG_temporaryDontBlock;var ADG_sendAbuse=a.ADG_sendAbuse;var ADG_TrustedType=a.ADG_TrustedType;var ADG_policyApi=a.ADG_policyApi;a=undefined;if(b.unsafeWindow){var unsafeWindow=b.unsafeWindow}if(b.GM_getValue){var GM_getValue=b.GM_getValue}if(b.GM_setValue){var GM_setValue=b.GM_setValue}if(b.GM_deleteValue){var GM_deleteValue=b.GM_deleteValue}if(b.GM_listValues){var GM_listValues=b.GM_listValues}if(b.GM_getResourceURL){var GM_getResourceURL=b.GM_getResourceURL}if(b.GM_getResourceText){var GM_getResourceText=b.GM_getResourceText}if(b.GM_xmlhttpRequest){var GM_xmlhttpRequest=b.GM_xmlhttpRequest}if(b.GM_addStyle){var GM_addStyle=b.GM_addStyle}if(b.GM_openInTab){var GM_openInTab=b.GM_openInTab}if(b.GM_setClipboard){var GM_setClipboard=b.GM_setClipboard}if(b.GM_log){var GM_log=b.GM_log}if(b.GM_registerMenuCommand){var GM_registerMenuCommand=b.GM_registerMenuCommand}if(b.GM_addElement){var GM_addElement=b.GM_addElement}b=undefined;
962// ==UserScript==
963// @name AdGuard Popup Blocker
964// @name:ar مانع النوافذ المنبثقة AdGuard
965// @name:be Блакавальнік усплывальнай рэкламы ад AdGuard
966// @name:ca Bloquejador de finestres emergents AdGuard
967// @name:cs AdGuard blokátor vyskakovacích oken
968// @name:da AdGuard Popup Blocker
969// @name:de AdGuard Pop-up-Blocker
970// @name:el Αποκλεισμός αναδυόμενων παραθύρων AdGuard
971// @name:es AdGuard Popup Blocker
972// @name:fa مسدودساز پاپ-آپ AdGuard
973// @name:fi AdGuard Ponnahdusesto
974// @name:fr Bloqueur de fenêtres pop-up de AdGuard
975// @name:he חוסם חלונות קופצים של AdGuard
976// @name:hr AdGuard Bloker skočnih prozora
977// @name:hu AdGuard Popup Blocker
978// @name:id Pemblokir Popup AdGuard
979// @name:it AdGuard Popup Blocker
980// @name:ja AdGuard ポップアップブロッカー
981// @name:ko AdGuard 팝업 차단기
982// @name:lt AdGuard iššokančiųjų langų blokatorius
983// @name:mk Блокатор на скокачки прозорци AdGuard
984// @name:ms AdGuard Penyekat Pop Timbul
985// @name:no AdGuards popup-blokkerer
986// @name:pl Bloker wyskakujących okienek przez AdGuard
987// @name:nl AdGuard Pop-up Blocker
988// @name:pt AdGuard Bloqueador de Pop-ups
989// @name:pt-PT Bloqueador de Popup AdGuard
990// @name:ro Blocant Pop-up AdGuard
991// @name:ru Блокировщик всплывающей рекламы от AdGuard
992// @name:sk AdGuard blokovač vyskakovacích okien
993// @name:sl AdGuard Zaviralec pojavnih oken
994// @name:sr-CS AdGuard blokator iskačućih prozora
995// @name:sr-Latn AdGuard blokator iskačućih prozora
996// @name:sv AdGuard Popup-blockerare
997// @name:ta AdGuard பாப்அப் தடுப்பான்
998// @name:th AdGuard Popup Blocker
999// @name:tr AdGuard Açılır Pencere Engelleyici
1000// @name:uk Блокувальник спливних вікон AdGuard
1001// @name:vi AdGuard Popup Blocker
1002// @name:zh AdGuard 弹窗拦截器
1003// @name:zh-HK AdGuard 彈出式視窗封鎖器
1004// @name:zh-TW AdGuard 彈出式視窗封鎖器
1005// @namespace adguard
1006// @description Blocks pop-up ads on web pages
1007// @description:ar لحظر الإعلانات المنبثقة على صفحات الويب
1008// @description:be Блакуе ўсплывальную рэкламу на старонках
1009// @description:ca Bloqueja els anuncis emergents a les pàgines web
1010// @description:cs Blokuje vyskakovací reklamy na webových stránkách
1011// @description:da Blokerer pop-op annoncer på websider
1012// @description:de Blockiert Anzeige-Pop-ups auf Websites
1013// @description:el Αποκλείει αναδυόμενες διαφημίσεις σε ιστοσελίδες
1014// @description:es Bloquea anuncios emergentes en sitios web
1015// @description:fa مسدودسازی تبلیغات پاپ آپ در صفحات وب.
1016// @description:fi Estää verkkosivujen ponnahdusmainokset.
1017// @description:fr Bloque les fenêtres pop-up avec publicités intrusives sur les pages web
1018// @description:he חוסם פרסומות קופצות בדפי רשת
1019// @description:hr Blokira skočne prozore na web stranicama
1020// @description:hu Blokkolja a felugró ablakban megjelenő reklámokat a webhelyeken
1021// @description:id Blokir iklan popup di halaman web
1022// @description:it Blocca gli annunci pop-up sulle pagine web
1023// @description:ja Webページでポップアップ広告をブロックします。
1024// @description:ko 웹 페이지에서 팝업 광고를 차단
1025// @description:lt Blokuoja iššokančius skelbimus tinklalapiuose
1026// @description:mk Блокира скокачки реклами на веб-страници
1027// @description:ms Sekat pop timbul pada laman web
1028// @description:no Blokker popup-annonser på nettsider
1029// @description:pl Blokuje wyskakujące okienka na stronach internetowych
1030// @description:nl Blokkeert pop-upadvertenties op webpagina's
1031// @description:pt Bloqueia anúncios pop-ups dentro dos sites
1032// @description:pt-PT Bloqueia anúncios popup em páginas da web.
1033// @description:ro Blochează reclame pop-up pe pagini web
1034// @description:ru Блокирует всплывающую рекламу на страницах
1035// @description:sk Blokuje vyskakovacie reklamy na webových stránkach
1036// @description:sl Blokira pojavne oglase na spletnih straneh
1037// @description:sr-CS Blokira iskačuće reklame na veb stranicama
1038// @description:sr-Latn Blokira iskačuće reklame na veb stranicama
1039// @description:sv Blockerar popup-annonser på webbsidor
1040// @description:ta வலைப்பக்கங்களில் பாப்அப் விளம்பரங்களைத் தடுக்கிறது
1041// @description:th ปิดกั้นโฆษณาป๊อปอัพในหน้าเว็บ
1042// @description:tr Web sayfalarında açılır pencere reklamlarını engeller
1043// @description:uk Блокує спливну рекламу на вебсторінках
1044// @description:vi Chặn quảng cáo bật lên trên các trang web
1045// @description:zh 拦截网页弹窗广告
1046// @description:zh-HK 封鎖網頁上的彈出式視窗廣告
1047// @description:zh-TW 封鎖於網頁上之彈出式視窗廣告
1048// @version 2.5.116
1049// @license LGPL-3.0; https://github.com/AdguardTeam/PopupBlocker/blob/master/LICENSE
1050// @downloadURL https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js
1051// @updateURL https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.meta.js
1052// @supportURL https://github.com/AdguardTeam/PopupBlocker/issues
1053// @homepageURL https://popupblocker.adguard.com/release/v1
1054// @author AdGuard
1055// @match http://*/*
1056// @match https://*/*
1057// @grant GM_getValue
1058// @grant GM_setValue
1059// @grant GM_deleteValue
1060// @grant GM_listValues
1061// @grant GM_getResourceURL

#f1f1f1;\n --grayc5: rgba(197, 197, 197, 0.47);\n --grey-shadow: 0 0 10px 3px rgba(162, 161, 161, 0.3);\n --grey92: #929292;\n --grey151: rgba(155, 155, 155, 0.22);\n}\n* {\n box-sizing: border-box;\n}\nhtml {\n font-size: 10px;\n height: 100%;\n}\nbody {\n height: 100%;\n margin: 0;\n font-size: 1.3rem;\n line-height: 1.428571429;\n color: #282828;\n color: var(--gray-base);\n font-family: \"Open Sans\", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Ubuntu, \"Helvetica Neue\", Arial, sans-serif;\n font-weight: 400;\n}\nbody.body--overflow {\n overflow: hidden;\n }\nul {\n list-style: none;\n}\ninput {\n outline: none;\n}\nbutton {\n font-size: inherit;\n color: inherit;\n border: 0;\n outline: none;\n background-color: transparent;\n}\nselect::-ms-expand {\n display: none;\n}\n.radio {\n display: none;\n}\n.radio-label {\n padding-left: 30px;\n position: relative;\n }\n.radio-label:after {\n content: '';\n cursor: pointer;\n position: absolute;\n left: 0;\n top: 0;\n width: 18px;\n height: 18px;\n border-radius: 100%;\n box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #cccccc;\n box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--graycc);\n transition: 0.3s ease box-shadow;\n transition: var(--t3) box-shadow;\n }\n.radio-label:hover:after {\n box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #66B574;\n box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--green74);\n }\n.radio:checked + .radio-label:before {\n content: '';\n position: absolute;\n top: 4px;\n left: 4px;\n width: 10px;\n height: 10px;\n border-radius: 100%;\n background-color: #66B574;\n background-color: var(--green74);\n }\n.radio:disabled + .radio-label:after {\n
